description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 97.

Heroic Perk: Elemental Mastery

Prerequisite: Elemental Awakening

You can replace the damage type of any spell you cast with your Primordial Element. When you deal damage of your Primordial Element, the spell gains one of the following modifiers, depending on your element, applied to any creature that fails its saving throw or is hit by the spell. A creature can only be affected once per round by one of these effects.

Acid: The creature’s AC is reduced by 3 until the start of your next turn.

Cold: The creature’s speed is reduced by 15 feet until the end of its next turn.

Fire: The creature takes an additional 3d10 fire damage at the start of its next turn.

Lightning: The creature cannot take reactions until the end of its next turn.

Thunder: The creature must succeed on a Strength saving throw against your spell save DC or be pushed up to 30 feet away from you and knocked prone.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
